description_long: This object is a rectangular cardboard box with a blue top and white sides, featuring bold yellow and black text and graphics. The top of the box displays the brand name 'MAGTECH' in large yellow letters, along with a circular target graphic and the words 'PISTOL & REVOLVER' and '.45 COLT 12.89G (200GR) FLAT LRN'. The box appears to be a package for ammunition, likely containing cartridges for pistols or revolvers. The sides of the box are plain white, while the top is visually striking with its blue background and prominent branding. The box is compact and lightweight, suitable for being carried by hand or stored on a shelf. Its construction suggests it is made primarily of cardboard, designed to protect and contain its contents securely.
description: A rectangular blue and white cardboard box labeled 'MAGTECH PISTOL & REVOLVER .45 COLT', featuring bold yellow branding and a target graphic on the top.
description_view_0: The left side of the box is visible, showing the blue top with yellow text and a partial view of the white side panel.
description_view_1: The front face of the box is shown, clearly displaying the 'MAGTECH PISTOL & REVOLVER .45 COLT' branding and target graphic on the blue top.
description_view_2: The right side of the box is visible, with the blue top and yellow text extending over the edge and a plain white side panel.
description_view_3: The back of the box is shown, with the large 'MAGTECH' text and target graphic dominating the blue top surface.
